content.full_text:
February 8, 2010

Mr. Bill Gausewitz  
915 L Street, Suite 1110  
Sacramento, California 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-10-026

Dear Mr. Gausewitz:

This letter is to notify you that we have withdrawn the above captioned request for advice per our telephone conversation on February 4, 2010.

If you have any questions, feel free to call me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin  
General Counsel

[signature]

By: Amber Maltbie  
Legal Intern, Legal Division
